modules.title: Secure MySQL
modules.summary: Learn about Azure Database for MySQL security, encryption in Azure Database for MySQL, and how to configure Microsoft Entra authentication.

modules.title: Introduction to Azure Local
modules.summary: In this module, you’ll learn how Azure Local helps you run virtual machines on-premises using hyperconverged infrastructure.

modules.title: Secure authentication and authorization for Azure OpenAI in Microsoft Foundry
modules.summary: Learn how to secure Azure OpenAI in Microsoft Foundry by using Microsoft Entra ID authentication, managed identities, least-privilege Foundry RBAC roles, and local authentication controls.
